title: GCP CloudSQL Configuration Source
description: GCP CloudSQL Database Connection Config. Uses the Google Cloud SQL Python Connector.

password.title: Database Password
password.description: Database user password. Leave empty if using IAM database authentication.

enableIamAuth.title: Enable IAM Authentication
enableIamAuth.description: Use GCP IAM for database authentication instead of a password.

gcpConfig.title: GCP Credentials Configuration
gcpConfig.description: GCP credentials to use. If not provided, Application Default Credentials will be used.
